abstract.text: Applies the given transform if the given condition evaluates to
Read the offset of the view
Perform an action only if the device is landscape mode
Run a task detached from the current task
Applies a shake effect to the view.
Applies a pulsating effect to the view.
Horizontally centers the view by embedding it
in a HStack bookended by Spacers.
Perform an action only if the device is portrait mode
Save the size of the view
Show an error message if there is any.
Save the frame of the view
